reasons: Akai can disrupt and pin enemies, giving Alucard a stable melee target to attack.
Akai's frontline engage can absorb the first layer of crowd control before Alucard enters.

proof.summary: Akai starts the displacement and zoning, while Alucard follows onto controlled targets to maintain melee damage and sustain.
worksBestWhen: Akai engages first and creates a target window.
Alucard waits until the enemy is disrupted before diving.
The fight happens near terrain or a narrow area.
failureCases: Alucard dives before Akai controls the target.
Akai pushes the target out of Alucard's follow-up path.

reasons: Kaja can suppress and drag a priority target into Alucard's melee range.
Alucard benefits from the controlled target because his damage and sustain require continued contact.

proof.summary: Kaja creates a single-target lockdown, and Alucard follows with melee burst and sustain during the control window.
worksBestWhen: Kaja catches a fragile or isolated target.
Alucard is in range to follow the drag.
The team collapses on the same target.
failureCases: Kaja is burst before completing the catch.
Alucard is peeled away from the target.
The target survives long enough for backup to arrive.

reasons: Grock can create terrain pressure and block retreat paths, helping Alucard keep targets in melee range.
Grock's durable frontline gives Alucard a safer angle to enter after the fight begins.

proof.summary: Grock disrupts positioning and limits escape routes, while Alucard uses the trapped space to continue melee pressure.
worksBestWhen: Grock places the wall behind or beside the target's escape path.
Alucard follows after Grock spends enemy attention.
The fight occurs in tight terrain where the wall has value.
failureCases: The enemy dashes around the wall.
Grock places the wall away from the target path.
Alucard is bursted before sustain can start.

reasons: Angela can attach to Alucard and shield him during his melee dive.
Alucard can use the added protection to keep attacking and trigger his sustain pattern.

proof.summary: Alucard commits into melee range, and Angela's Heartguard can protect him during the focus-fire window.
worksBestWhen: Angela casts Heartguard as Alucard enters.
Alucard chooses a fight where he can keep attacking.
The team follows while Alucard draws pressure.
failureCases: Enemy burst breaks through the shield quickly.

reasons: Mathilda can give Alucard extra mobility and shielding before he commits.
Alucard can use Guiding Wind support to reach targets or reset his position during skirmishes.

proof.summary: Mathilda supports Alucard's entry with mobility and shield value, helping him reach a target without starting the dive alone.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda prepares Guiding Wind before Alucard commits.
Alucard uses the mobility to reach a killable target.
The team plays a skirmish tempo around Alucard's entry.
failureCases: Alucard enters before Mathilda is nearby.
Enemy saves hard CC for Alucard's landing point.
The mobility path pulls Alucard into an isolated fight.
